query:
WITH active_products AS (
  SELECT id, poNumber, serialNumber, imei,
         CASE WHEN poNumber IS NULL OR poNumber = '' THEN 'without_po' ELSE 'with_po' END AS sourceType
  FROM products
  WHERE archivedAt IS NULL
), duplicate_groups AS (
  SELECT 'serialNumber' AS duplicateType, serialNumber AS duplicateValue
  FROM active_products
  WHERE serialNumber IS NOT NULL AND serialNumber <> ''
  GROUP BY serialNumber
  HAVING COUNT(*) > 1
  UNION ALL
  SELECT 'imei' AS duplicateType, imei AS duplicateValue
  FROM active_products
  WHERE imei IS NOT NULL AND imei <> ''
  GROUP BY imei
  HAVING COUNT(*) > 1
), classified_groups AS (
  SELECT g.duplicateType,
         g.duplicateValue,
         COUNT(*) AS duplicateRows,
         SUM(CASE WHEN p.sourceType = 'with_po' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS withPoRows,
         SUM(CASE WHEN p.sourceType = 'without_po' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS withoutPoRows
  FROM duplicate_groups g
  JOIN active_products p
    ON (g.duplicateType = 'serialNumber' AND p.serialNumber = g.duplicateValue)
    OR (g.duplicateType = 'imei' AND p.imei = g.duplicateValue)
  GROUP BY g.duplicateType, g.duplicateValue
)
SELECT duplicateType,
       COUNT(*) AS duplicateGroups,
       SUM(CASE WHEN withPoRows > 0 AND withoutPoRows = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS onlyWithPoGroups,
       SUM(CASE WHEN withPoRows = 0 AND withoutPoRows > 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS onlyWithoutPoGroups,
       SUM(CASE WHEN withPoRows > 0 AND withoutPoRows > 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS mixedGroups
FROM classified_groups
GROUP BY duplicateType
ORDER BY duplicateType;

  SELECT 'imei' AS duplicateType, imei AS duplicateValue

  WHERE imei IS NOT NULL AND imei <> ''
  GROUP BY imei
  HAVING COUNT(*) > 1
), classified_groups AS (

         SUM(CASE WHEN p.sourceType = 'with_po' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS withPoRows,
         SUM(CASE WHEN p.sourceType = 'without_po' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS withoutPoRows
  FROM duplicate_groups g

       SUM(CASE WHEN withPoRows = 0 AND withoutPoRows > 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS onlyWithoutPoGroups,
       SUM(CASE WHEN withPoRows > 0 AND withoutPoRows > 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS mixedGroups
